mnemonics: Vijayalakshmi's Modules: Very Insightful Journey Yielding Learning Algorithms, Creating Heuristic Models, Supervised Methods, Inspiring Innovation (V.I.J.A.Y.A.L.A.K.S.H.M.I)
keyPoints: Focus on core machine learning algorithms
Emphasis on practical implementation and coding
Covers both supervised and unsupervised learning techniques
commonMistakes: Confusing similar algorithms (e.g., SVM vs Logistic Regression)
Misapplying algorithms to wrong problem types
